extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon won from breakaway 2+ minutes down on GC while HENAO Sergio attacked on steepest section, gaining time bonus on ALAPHILIPPE Julian who dropped GALLOPIN Tony in final meters
tactical_patterns: Quickstep allowed 2+ minute GC deficit riders like Yates to escape while policing closer threats Henao/Gallopin/Izagirre ruthlessly
Henao attacked steepest gradient section of final climb to maximize time gap and secure 6-second bonus
Dan Martin sacrificed top-10 GC completely for Alaphilippe domestique work, revealing Quick-Step all-in leader protection strategy

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: dropped closest GC rival Gallopin in final meters despite looking vulnerable to Henao's attack on steep section
rider_signals.HENAO Sergio: positive: best positioned GC threat after gaining time bonus via attacking steepest gradients where Alaphilippe vulnerable
rider_signals.GALLOPIN Tony: negative: lost Alaphilippe's wheel final hundred meters on steep finish despite being closest GC rival pre-stage
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: neutral: abandoned personal top-10 GC for full domestique duty, signaling Quick-Step prioritizes single leader over depth
